devices.device_id_invalid_format: Device id must be 3-100 characters and contain only letters, digits, dot, dash or underscore
devices.device_name_too_short: Device name must be at least {min} characters long
devices.device_name_too_long: Device name cannot be longer than {max} characters
devices.device_owner_empty: Device owner id cannot be empty
devices.device_owner_invalid_format: Device owner id must be a valid UUID
devices.device_already_exists: Device with id {id} is already registered
devices.device_not_found: Device with id {id} was not found
devices.battery_level_invalid: Battery level must be a number
devices.battery_level_out_of_range: Battery level must be between {min} and {max}
devices.temperature_invalid: Temperature must be a valid number
devices.temperature_out_of_range: Temperature must be between {min} and {max} degrees Celsius
devices.coordinates_partial: Latitude and longitude must be provided together
devices.device_status_invalid: Device status must be one of: {allowed}
devices.telemetry_timestamp_invalid: Telemetry timestamp must be a valid date
devices.telemetry_timestamp_in_future: Telemetry timestamp cannot be more than {skewSeconds} seconds in the future
devices.telemetry_event_id_empty: Telemetry event id cannot be empty
devices.telemetry_event_id_invalid_forma: Telemetry event id must be a valid UUID
devices.battery_threshold_invalid: Battery alert threshold must be between {min} and {max}
devices.temperature_threshold_invalid: Temperature alert threshold must be between {min} and {max}
devices.alert_id_invalid_format: Alert id must be a valid UUID
devices.alert_type_invalid: Alert type must be one of: {allowed}
devices.latest_state_unavailable: Device {deviceId} has not reported any telemetry yet
devices.history_range_invalid: History range start must not be after its end
